message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorBorderColor #777777
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
}

actor Professor as Prof
boundary "tela principal" as Tela
control StudentController as Ctrl
entity StudentEntity as Ent

Prof -> Tela : visualizar a lista de alunos
activate Tela

Tela -> Ctrl : requisitar lista de alunos
activate Ctrl

Ctrl -> Ent : buscar por alunos
activate Ent

Ent --> Ctrl : lista de alunos
deactivate Ent

Ctrl --> Tela : responder com a lista de alunos
deactivate Ctrl

Tela --> Prof : exibir lista de alunos
deactivate Tela
@enduml
